svg.title: GitOps Flow — Git to OpenShift via ArgoCD App of Apps
svg.desc: Diagram showing how a single git push flows through ArgoCD app-of-apps pattern to deploy 26 applications across OpenShift namespaces.
svg.text: GITOPS FLOW · App of Apps · Single Bootstrap Command

g.text: App of Apps Pattern · 26 ArgoCD Applications
kafka · spark · airflow · trino · minio · vault · monitoring · superset · platform-command-ui · ...
each app owns one namespace · selfHeal enabled · prune enabled

svg.text: selfHeal: true — ArgoCD corrects any manual cluster change within 3 minutes
prune: true — resources removed from Git are removed from cluster · single bootstrap: oc apply -f apps/root.yaml
